note: Sessions per week — assign them to whichever days fit your life. Keep 1 easy/rest day between hard sessions, and never drop the long ride.

weeks.focus: Sustained-effort conversion — break the stop-go habit

sessions.title: 3×15 min sweet spot
sessions.detail: 15 min warm-up first. No stops mid-interval — UBC loop, Iona flats, or Stanley Park at a quiet hour.

sessions.title: 30 min continuous tempo
sessions.detail: 60–75 min total with the tempo block unbroken.

sessions.title: Long ride 70 km / ~800 m
sessions.detail: Include one 20+ min climb at tempo — Cypress to first lookout or Seymour half-way.
sessions.alt: Shorten to 50 km, keep it continuous

sessions.title: Easy spin
sessions.detail: Genuinely easy — conversation pace.

sessions.title: 2×20 min sweet spot
sessions.detail: Continuous intervals, no stops.

sessions.title: 2×20 min tempo, rolling terrain
sessions.detail: Rolling route; hold the effort over the rollers.

sessions.title: Long ride 85 km / ~1,000 m
sessions.detail: Full Cypress or full Seymour in the middle. Practice race fueling: 60–80 g carbs/h, drink every 15 min.
sessions.alt: Cut to 70 km, keep the climb

sessions.title: Easy spin
sessions.detail: Recovery pace.

weeks.focus: Biggest build week — finish it tired

sessions.title: 2×20 min threshold
sessions.detail: Hard but repeatable — if the second interval collapses, the first was too hard.

sessions.title: 90 min hilly tempo
sessions.detail: Hilly route, accumulate tempo on the climbs.

sessions.title: Long ride 100 km / ~1,300 m
sessions.target: Climbs at goal fondo pace 220–250 W
sessions.detail: Vancouver → Horseshoe Bay → Lions Bay and back — the actual event road.

sessions.title: Easy spin
sessions.detail: You should finish this week tired — keep this one honest-easy.

weeks.focus: Recovery — do not skip; fitness consolidates here

sessions.title: 1×20 min tempo (only intensity)
sessions.detail: The week's only quality. Cut total volume ~40%.

sessions.title: Easy long ride 60 km, flat
sessions.detail: Flat and easy — Iona/Steveston style.

sessions.title: Easy spin
sessions.detail: Or a day fully off the bike — watch HRV and sleep rebound.

sessions.title: 3×20 min sweet spot — signature workout
sessions.detail: 60 min of sweet spot — the signature fondo session.

sessions.title: 5×3 min Z5 touch-up
sessions.detail: Keeps the top end awake without big fatigue.

sessions.title: Long ride 110 km / ~1,500 m — rehearsal
sessions.target: Target event pace; do NOT surge above 260 W on climbs
sessions.detail: Full rehearsal: same breakfast, same fueling, same pacing discipline.

sessions.title: Easy spin
sessions.detail: Recovery pace.

sessions.title: 2×25 min sweet spot
sessions.detail: Longest sustained blocks of the plan.

sessions.title: 30 min tempo
sessions.detail: Otherwise easy.

sessions.title: DRESS REHEARSAL 120–130 km / 1,500–1,800 m
sessions.target: Full event nutrition, clothing, ~7 AM start
sessions.detail: Ideal: Horseshoe Bay → Squamish (→ turn back). This ride answers every remaining question.
sessions.alt: Do not skip — shorten to 100 km if needed

sessions.title: Recovery spin only
sessions.detail: Legs up otherwise.

sessions.title: 2×15 min threshold
sessions.detail: Sharp but short — volume this week ≈ 60–70% of week 6.

sessions.title: 20 min tempo
sessions.detail: Comfortable quality.

sessions.title: Long ride 80 km moderate / ~800 m
sessions.detail: Enjoy it — the work is done.

sessions.title: Easy spin
sessions.detail: Recovery pace.

sessions.title: 3×8 min @ 260 W
sessions.detail: Enough intensity to stay sharp. Suggested: Tuesday.

sessions.title: Easy spin
sessions.detail: Suggested: Wednesday. Thursday off or 30 min spin.

sessions.title: Openers + prep
sessions.detail: Prep bike, bottles, drop bag. In bed by 10 PM. Suggested: Friday.

sessions.title: 🏁 RBC GranFondo Whistler — RACE DAY
sessions.target: Start 190–210 W; climbs 220–250 W; never >260 W before Squamish
sessions.detail: Eat from minute 20: 60–90 g carbs/h, 500–750 ml fluid/h. The ride is decided on the Squamish→Whistler false-flat.
